title: Senior Revenue Manager at Radisson India

jsonLd.title: Senior Revenue Manager at Radisson India
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Revenue Manager with drive and ambition, Radisson India in Rajkot is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Radisson India:
Radisson India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Food Safety

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Radisson India!
